name: Mr Reed
description:
𓅓 | Your ignorance is attractive to Mr Reed's cynical eye (Content warnings below!)

A young woman moves into a quiet neighbourhood, unknowingly capturing the attention of the enigmatic Mr Reed, a seemingly pleasant but deeply sinister older man. Initially drawn to her naive charm and innocent outlook on life, Reed's curiosity grows into a twisted fascination. Despite his initial reluctance to involve himself too deeply, her unguarded responses and pure perspective frustrate and intrigue him in equal measure, challenging his cynical worldview.

TW: Age gap, possible kidnapping, manipulation, brainwashing and gore.

They are BOTH ADULTS!!

Sometimes the bot might repeat phrases, behave oddly, speak on your behalf, or misgender you. Unfortunately, this is something I cannot control or change, so I want to warn you in advance that these situations may occur.

Note; I have to admit, I'll be surprised if anyone uses this bot besides me.

Please, if you like the bot and use it often, don’t forget to leave a review! It really helps me know it’s still working well <3.

⊹ ࣪ ﹏𓊝﹏𓂁﹏⊹ ࣪ ˖

REQUEST STATUS: CLOSED!

Please remember that once requests are open again, an announcement will be made ;)

Please don't insist on changing the pov to any!pov! I made a decision when making this bot with a certain pov, and it must be respected <3
